content: Map the full AddItem garment-analysis call chain (entry route → services → model calls)
Identify every external/network call and measure where time is spent (Gemini? Eyes? both?)
Check whether Gemini is invoked for detection/segmentation alongside Eyes (the suspected wasteful round-trip)
Verify Eyes' 18-field schema covers detection+segmentation+attributes — can it do it in ONE turn?
Produce a written RCA + concrete recommendation (no code changes until user approves)
